headline: CoStar Group Announces Launch of CoStar Platform in France
summary: PARIS, July 02, 2026--CoStar Group (NASDAQ: CSGP), an S&P 500 company and the global leader in real estate marketplaces, information, analytics and 3D digital twin technology today announces the official launch of the CoStar platform in France – bringing its commercial real estate intelligence platform to one of Europe’s largest markets.
